name: Pork Chops with Cranberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pork chops with pepper. Heat olive oil in a large skillet and cook the chops over medium heat until lightly browned on both sides, about 6 minutes. Reduce heat, add chopped onion to the pan and continue cooking for an additional 8 to 10 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, in a separate pan, combine apple juice concentrate, brown sugar, washed cranberries, chopped tart apple, cinnamon, ground cloves, and nutmeg. Cook over medium-low heat until the cranberries burst and the sauce thickens slightly, about 4 minutes.
3. Remove any accumulated fat from the chops. Pour the sauce over the meat and stir into the onions in the pan. Cover and cook over low heat until the chops are done, approximately 5 to 8 minutes. Serve immediately with rice or boiled potatoes.
